personal.name: Rakshitha Srinivasa
personal.title: Full-stack Developer
personal.subtitle: MS Computer Science Santa Clara University
personal.tagline: Code by day. Dream in pixels by night.
bio: Master’s student in Computer Science at Santa Clara University with 2 years of experience building scalable full-stack applications and distributed systems. Strong focus on system design, performance optimization, and production-grade software across React, TypeScript, Node.js, and RESTful architectures.

At SCU’s HCI Lab, I’m building SMAR, a large-scale data processing and analytics platform that scrapes and analyzes 10,000+ mobile applications from the Google Play Store and Apple App Store. Work includes microservices-based architecture, CI/CD automation, performance benchmarking using Grafana k6, and large-scale data analysis presented at Stanford University.

Previously at StepNStones Technologies, I developed production civic-tech systems including a disaster management platform used by 1,000+ government authorities, a real-time analytics system processing millions of social media events per day, and a citizen services platform integrating payments and live location tracking. Focus areas included system reliability, backend scalability, and real-time data processing.
Recently built an AI-powered flight booking agent using LLMs, agentic workflows, and Node.js, exploring applied AI systems for automating real-world user workflows.
Seeking Software Engineering Internship (Summer or Fall 2026) opportunities

publications.title: Overview of Data Warehouse
publications.journal: International Research Journal of Engineering and Technology (IRJET)
authorAffiliations: Department of Information Science and Engineering, JSS Academy of Technical Education, Bangalore
publications.abstract: In latest years, the database community has seen major developments in a new technology: Data Warehouse. A data warehouse is a special repository that stores preprocessed queries on data which resides in many legacy, heterogeneous, or operational sources. The foremost goal of this paper is to introduce the learners to the basic concepts and terminology associated with data warehouse — covering architectures, ETL processes, OLAP tools, data marts, and real-world applications across banking, healthcare, retail, and government sectors.

education.degree: Master of Science, Computer Science and Engineering

experience.company: Human-Computer Interaction Lab, Santa Clara University
bullets: Developed SMAR (smar-tool.org), a scalable full-stack platform using ReactJS, TypeScript, Node.js, REST APIs, and microservices, supporting analysis of 10,000+ mobile applications across Google Play and Apple App Store ecosystems.

Built automated CI/CD pipelines, monitoring infrastructure, and performance testing frameworks using Grafana k6, improving system reliability, observability and collection for large-scale analytics systems.
Debugged and resolved system bottlenecks, enhanced application performance, and presented research outcomes at Stanford University.

Developed a high-availability disaster management platform using Angular, Node.js, MySQL, and REST APIs, integrating WhatsApp Business APIs for real-time event processing and notification delivery across distributed systems supporting 1,000+ authorities.

Built a real-time analytics dashboard using ReactJS, Node.js, and Meta Graph APIs to process large-scale social media data, improving telemetry monitoring, system performance, and operational reliability for millions of daily interactions.
Developed a cloud-ready citizen services portal using ReactJS, Node.js, Razorpay, and OpenStreetMap, enabling secure payments and real-time location services for 10,000+ users.

academicProjects.title: RecFlix – Movie Recommendation System
academicProjects.description: Engineered a recommendation engine using content-based and collaborative filtering on 1M+ TMDb dataset. Designed normalized relational schemas with optimized SQL queries enabling collaborative playlist features with social following functionality.

academicProjects.title: AI-Powered Flight Booking Agent
academicProjects.description: Developed an AI-powered flight booking assistant using ReactJS, Node.js, and Agentic AI to automate real-time flight search and reservation workflows through natural language interactions. Built multi-step AI workflows integrating external travel platforms for intelligent recommendations and booking automation.

academicProjects.title: Yard Sales Mobile Marketplace App
academicProjects.description: Developed a cross-platform mobile marketplace application with real-time chat, push notifications, location-based search, image uploads, and Google Maps integration for a seamless yard sale buying and selling experience.

academicProjects.title: Computerized Garden Management System
academicProjects.description: Designed and developed a computerized garden management system to help users track plant inventories, schedule watering and maintenance tasks, and monitor garden conditions through an interactive dashboard with CRUD operations and reporting.

workProjects.title: Asset Defect Management
workProjects.description: Developed web application using ReactJS for the state of Karnataka’s Power Corporation Department significantly improving system reliability and operational efficiency across 50,000+ assets.

workProjects.title: HRMS Portal
workProjects.description: Designed and developed a web and mobile application for on-site personnel, streamlining attendance tracking and management processes that reduced operational costs significantly.

workProjects.title: Tirupati Tourism Platform
workProjects.description: Tourism platform with social media analytics, handling daily user interactions with personalized recommendations and dynamic content.

workProjects.title: Disaster Management Platform
workProjects.description: Real-time emergency response platform on improving coordination efficiency across multiple municipalities with live alert systems.
